positive: A majestic, stylized golden retriever puppy happily chasing a brightly colored holographic butterfly through a meadow of oversized, luminous wildflowers. The art style is high-contrast, minimalist illustrative vector art with strong linework and flat color blocking, reminiscent of mid-century modern poster design. The composition should be centralized and dynamic, with the puppy in motion and the butterfly serving as a key element of visual intrigue. Use a limited, vibrant palette of teals, oranges, lavender, and deep emerald green. Clean silhouettes, clear outlines, and perfect print readability are paramount. High detail level, sticker-sheet quality.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, low quality, artifacts, watermarks, signature, logo, text, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, messy, clutter, photorealism, realistic photo, 3d render
